title: astragalus dillinghamii
intro: Astragalus dillinghamii, also known as Dillingham's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to Hawaii and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Astragalus dillinghamii include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and protect against oxidative damage. Astragalus dillinghamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and as dietary supplements.
